text: Advise to give 2nd dose after 8 hours and to give dose twice daily for 2 more days.
source_quote: Advise to give 2nd dose after 8 hours and to give dose twice daily for 2 more days.

text: All medicines have an expiration date, after which they may not be effective or could be harmful.
source_quote: All medicines have an expiration date, after which they may not be effective or could be harmful

text: Emphasize that it is important to give the amoxicillin for the full 5 days, even if the child feels better.
source_quote: Emphasize that it is important to give the amoxicillin for the full 5 days, even if the child feels better.

text: Counsel caregiver on feeding or refer the child to a supplementary feeding programme, if available.
source_quote: Counsel caregiver on feeding or refer the child to a supplementary feeding programme, if available

text: The caregiver should give the first dose of treatment in your presence.
source_quote: the caregiver should give the first dose of treatment in your presence

text: Advise caregiver to give more fluids and continue feeding.
source_quote: Advise caregiver to give more fluids and continue feeding

text: Advise caregiver, if needed: WHEN and WHERE is the next vaccine to be given?
source_quote: Advise caregiver, if needed: WHEN and WHERE is the next vaccine to be given?

text: Advise caregiver on sleeping under a bednet (ITN).
source_quote: Advise caregiver on sleeping under a bednet (ITN)

text: Advise on when to return: go to nearest health facility immediately if child cannot drink or feed, becomes sicker, or has blood in the stool.
source_quote: Advise on when to return

text: Give zinc for the full 10 days, even if the diarrhoea stops.
source_quote: it is important to give the zinc for the full ten days, even if the diarrhoea stops

text: Follow up child in 3 days.
source_quote: Follow up child in 3 days

text: Follow up child on return at least once a week until child is well.
source_quote: FOLLOW UP child on return at least once a week until child is well

text: Explain why the child needs to go to the health facility.
source_quote: Explain why the child needs to go to the health facility

text: Arrange transportation, and help solve other difficulties in referral.
source_quote: Arrange transportation, and help solve other difficulties in referral

text: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY to health facility.
source_quote: If any danger sign, REFER URGENTLY to health facility

text: Write a referral note.
source_quote: Write a referral note

text: If RDT is positive, give oral antimalarial AL (Artemether-Lumefantrine). Give twice daily for 3 days.
source_quote: If RDT is positive, give oral antimalarial AL (Artemether-Lumefantrine)

text: Give oral antibiotic (amoxicillin tablet - 250mg). Give twice daily for 5 days.
source_quote: Give oral antibiotic (amoxicillin tablet - 250mg) Give twice daily for 5 days

text: Give ORS. Help caregiver give child ORS solution in front of you until child is no longer thirsty.
source_quote: Give ORS. Help caregiver give child ORS solution in front of you until child is no longer thirsty.

text: Give zinc supplement. Give 1 dose daily for 10 days.
source_quote: Give zinc supplement. Give 1 dose daily for 10 days

text: Give rectal artesunate suppository (100 mg) for pre-referral treatment of fever with severe danger signs.
source_quote: Give rectal artesunate suppository (100 mg)
